body:
# Description

Cancelled by the 2026-04 pre-ACP archive pass. The local-openai execution line was superseded and archived.


# [PKT-PRV-029](task-0096): Provider Batch Processing

## Purpose

Implement provider batch processing.

## Scope

- Batch format
- Processing logic
- Error handling

## Implementation

1. Define format
2. Implement processing
3. Add error handling

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Format defined
2. Processing works
3. Errors handled
